summary: Overnight repo Treasury purchases are overwhelmingly near zero on normal mid-month days. Feb 10 is an ordinary Tuesday with no special calendar effects. Recent data shows calm regime.
content: FRED series RPONTSYD. Historical mid-month (days 8-12) distribution: P50=0.001, P80=0.005, P90=0.1. About 46% of mid-month days are exactly zero. The Oct-Dec 2025 stress period (values up to 31.5B) has subsided - Jan 5 onward shows normal near-zero values. Feb 10, 2025 was exactly 0.0. Feb 10, 2026 is a Tuesday, no quarter/month-end effects.
